name: Laura Fine
bio: Laura Fine is listed as a Democratic candidate in IL-09 for the 2026 primary. She currently serves in the Illinois Senate and is part of the open-seat contest. (Source: Shaw Local candidate list, March 5, 2026: https://www.shawlocal.com/northwest-herald/2026/03/05/illinois-primary-ballot-heres-whos-running-in-the-march-17-election/)

jacket.note: FEC candidate totals pending ETL import.
